summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Visual Homing Documentation and Firmware system. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. 100% test success rate across all components.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ endpoint returns valid response with message and version
Backend API /api/docs/list returns list of 9 documentation files
Backend API /api/docs/{filename} returns document content with HTML rendering
Backend API /api/firmware/structure returns complete firmware file structure
Backend API /api/firmware/file/{filepath} returns file content correctly
Frontend loads with Visual Homing title and proper navigation
All navigation tabs (Documentation, Firmware, About) are functional
Documentation section displays 9 documentation files and loads content
Firmware section displays file tree with 31 files and shows code content
About section displays project information and specifications table
Tab switching between all sections works correctly
Document content loads with proper HTML rendering
Code viewer displays firmware file content correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working)
